title: Vežba 72

questions.text: David angesemaje kuthibitisha mtazamo wa Anna huku akieleza wake mwenyewe?

answers.answer: You're completely wrong about remote work.
answers.feedback: Ovaj odgovor ne potvrđuje pogled Anne i previše je oštar za izjednačenu konverzaciju.

answers.answer: I see your perspective, but I still think there's value in having everyone in the office.

dialogue.text: That's a valid point. However, we've been using collaboration tools to keep everyone connected.
It takes some adjustment, but once people get used to it, it works quite well.

instructions: Slušajte audio odgovor na pitanje ispod.
explanation:
I see your perspective, but... je način da se poštuje tuđi stav pre nego što se uvedu protivrečni stavovi. Ovaj izraz pomaže da razgovor ostane uvažavajući i jasan. Primer:

  • Student na obuci: We should use a new programming language for this project.

  • Stariji programer: I see your perspective, but switching languages might slow us down. – Ova osoba razume ideju, ali ukazuje na mogući nedostatak.
